sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n112075" key="forbadiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φορβ-ᾰδικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n112075.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">characteristic of the 'herd',</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὅσον ἔνεστι τῇ ψυχῇ φ. καὶ ἀγελαῖον καὶ ἀξύνετον λόγου</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.713b</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
